ddls:
CREATE TABLE "speakers" (
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker */,
  "speaker_name" TEXT /* Full name of the speaker */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the speaker (e.g., Member of the Executive Board of the ECB) */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief description of the speaker's background and expertise */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* The URL of the speaker's image */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* A JSON object containing the speaker's social media handles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speeches" (
  "speech_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speech */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speaker who made the speech */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the speech was made */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the speech */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the speech */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the speech was made */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event where the speech was made */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., conference, meeting) */,
  "published" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the speech is published or not */,
  "tags" TEXT /* A JSON array of keywords related to the speech */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speech_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speeches_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speech_content" (
  "speech_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speech */,
  "content" TEXT /* Full text of the speech */,
  "summary" TEXT /* A brief summary of the speech */,
  "transcript" TEXT /* The full transcript of the speech */,
  "slides" TEXT /* A JSON array of URLs of the presentation slides */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speech_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Monetary policy, Financial stability) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speech_category_map" (
  "speech_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speech */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "weight" REAL /* A score indicating the relevance of the category to the speech */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speech_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* The user's password (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* The number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speech_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "speech_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speech being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the speech */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the speech was accessed */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* The amount of time the user spent accessing the speech */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speech_access_speech_id FOREIGN KEY ("speech_id") REFERENCES speeches ("speech_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speech_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator (e.g., GDP, inflation rate) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the indicator was recorded */,
  "unit" TEXT /* The unit of measurement for the indicator value */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* The frequency of the indicator (e.g., daily, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feed */,
  "feed_name" TEXT /* Name of the feed (e.g., Bloomberg, Reuters) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the feed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the feed was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the news feed */,
  "author" TEXT /* The author of the news feed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speech_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "speech_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speech being analyzed */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator used in the analysis */,
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news feed used in the analysis */,
  "analysis" TEXT /* Text of the analysis */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* The methodology used for the analysis */,
  "results" TEXT /* A JSON object containing the results of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speech_analysis_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speech_analysis_speech_id FOREIGN KEY ("speech_id") REFERENCES speeches ("speech_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speech_analysis_feed_id FOREIGN KEY ("feed_id") REFERENCES news_feeds ("feed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speech_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis that the recommendation is based on */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Text of the recommendation */,
  "priority" REAL /* A score indicating the priority of the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speech_recommendations_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES speech_analysis ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speech_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis that the report is based on */,
  "report" TEXT /* Text of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speech_reports_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES speech_analysis ("analysis_id")
)
